source: Ultralytics YOLO26n COCO80 checkpoint exported locally with Ultralytics 8.4.92
limitations: COCO80 provides a baseline common-object detector, not complete environmental-risk coverage.
This model does not provide vehicle ReID embeddings or identity recovery by itself.
Person and vehicle detections are metadata and safety evidence only.
No detection grants payload authorization, flight-control authority, or person-safety clearance.
Deployment-domain accuracy, licensing, dataset rights, and TensorRT latency review remain pending.
